search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:accesspoints" $orgid$ | rename deviceName as "Device Name", deviceSerial as "Device Serial", category as "Category", meraki_event_type as "Type" | dedup occurredAt, clientId | table "Device Name", "Device Serial", "Category","Type"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:accesspoints" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, clientId | search deviceName="$row.Device Name$" deviceSerial="$row.Device Serial$" category="$row.Category$" meraki_event_type="$row.Type$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:accesspoints" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, clientId | spath type | search type="auto_rf_channel_change" | stats count as "Count" by deviceName | rename deviceName as "Device Name" | sort - 0 Count

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:accesspoints" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, clientId | spath type | search type="auto_rf_channel_change" deviceName="$row.Device Name$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:accesspoints" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, clientId | stats count as "Count" by eventData.oldChan, eventData.newChan | rename eventData.oldChan as "Old Channel", eventData.newChan as "New Channel" | sort - 0 Count

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:accesspoints" $orgid$ | dedup occurredAt, clientId | search eventData.oldChan="$row.Old Channel$" eventData.newChan="$row.New Channel$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$
